name: fz_9901_1221
_finding: D-258 graduate (xfail D-255 -> regression pin): firing count engine 4 vs oracle 2, pre-existing at 4ee9c02. Root cause: the D-106 late-continue skipped the D-091 continue-path self re-evaluation; fixed D-258.
drl:
rule "R0"
salience 10
agenda-group "gb"
when
    T1($b0_0_0 : f2)
    T0($b0_1_0 : f1)
then
end
rule "R1"
salience 8
when
    $p1_0 : T0(f0 < -1 || f0 == -3, f1 == false)
then
    $p1_0.setF1(true);
    update($p1_0);
end
rule "R2"
when
    T1(f1 matches "[b-t]", f0 == false, $b2_0_0 : f0)
then
    insertLogical(new T2(2, true, -1));
end
rule "R3"
salience -1
when
    $p3_0 : T1(f1 < "a", f0 == false)
then
    $p3_0.setF0(true);
    $p3_0.setF1($p3_0.getF1());
    update($p3_0);
end
rule "R4"
when
    T1($b4_0_0 : f2)
    $p4_1 : T0($b4_1_0 : f1)
then
    drools.setFocus("gb");
    delete($p4_1);
end
rule "R5"
when
    T2(f2 != 8, $b5_0_0 : f2)
    T2(f1 == false, f1 == false, f2 > -1 && < 8, $b5_1_0 : f1, $b5_1_1 : f1)
then
end
